course_title: NAVIGATING THE DATA REVOLUTION: CONCEPTS OF DATA & INFORMATION SCIENCE
description: Provides an introduction into the world of Data Science. Includes hands-on projects using scenarios involving analysis of real-world data and development of graphical visualizations. Introduces statistical tests, data management, data programming, data ethics and visualization of data.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Satisfied Quantitative Reasoning (QR) A requirement, Satisfied Communications A requirement, and sophomore standing
